clauses.aim_at_target.name: Aim Target
clauses.aim_at_nearest_foe.name: Aim Nearest Foe
clauses.if_marked.name: If Marked
clauses.if_marked.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused actor or tile is marked by you.
clauses.if_occupied.name: If Occupied
clauses.if_occupied.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile contains an actor.
clauses.if_clear.name: If Clear
clauses.if_clear.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile can be occupied.
clauses.mark_them.name: Mark
clauses.mark_them.tooltip: Place your mark on the focused actor or tile.
clauses.damage_them.name: Damage
clauses.damage_them.tooltip: Deal 1 damage to the focused actor.
clauses.raise_stone.name: Raise Stone
clauses.raise_stone.tooltip: Create a temporary blocking stone on the focused clear tile.
clauses.push_them.name: Push
clauses.push_them.tooltip: Push the focused actor away from the caster.
clauses.poison_them.name: Poison
clauses.poison_them.tooltip: Attach poison with 3 stacks to the focused actor. Poison deals 1 damage at the start of that actor's turn, then falls by 1.
clauses.bleed_them.name: Bleed
clauses.bleed_them.tooltip: Attach bleed with 1 stack to the focused actor. Bleed deals damage equal to its stack count when that actor moves.
clauses.spend_poison.name: Spend Poison
clauses.spend_poison.tooltip: Consume 1 poison stack from the focused actor. True if the stack was spent.
clauses.spend_bleed.name: Spend Bleed
clauses.spend_bleed.tooltip: Consume 1 bleed stack from the focused actor. True if the stack was spent.
clauses.lightning_shield.name: Lightning Shield
clauses.lightning_shield.tooltip: Attach a lightning shield to the focused actor. It spends that actor's charge to strike enemies that become adjacent.
clauses.add_lightning_charge.name: Add Charge
clauses.add_lightning_charge.tooltip: Add 1 charge counter to the focused actor. Lightning shield uses charge as adjacency damage and spends 1 when it fires.
clauses.add_lightning_ward.name: Add Ward
clauses.add_lightning_ward.tooltip: Attach 1 ward stack to the focused actor. Ward absorbs incoming damage events until its stacks run out.
clauses.spend_focus.name: Spend Focus
clauses.spend_focus.tooltip: Consume 1 focus bonus from the caster. True if the counter was spent.
clauses.spend_memory.name: Spend Memory
clauses.spend_memory.tooltip: Consume 1 memory bonus from the caster. True if the counter was spent.
clauses.store_memory_ref.name: Store Memory
clauses.store_memory_ref.tooltip: Store the currently focused actor or tile in the primary memory reference.
clauses.focus_memory_ref.name: Recall Memory
clauses.focus_memory_ref.tooltip: Focus the actor or tile stored in the primary memory reference.
behavior_primitives.flow.stop.name: Stop
behavior_primitives.flow.stop.descriptio: End the current behavior graph and return to the caller.
behavior_primitives.focus.selected_targe: Set spell focus to the selected target tile.
Set focus to the nearest actor matching the requested relation.
behavior_primitives.focus.self.name: Focus Self
behavior_primitives.focus.self.descripti: Set focus to the acting actor.
behavior_primitives.focus.store_ref.name: Store Focus Reference
behavior_primitives.focus.store_ref.desc: Store the current focus in a named reference slot.
behavior_primitives.focus.ref.name: Focus Reference
behavior_primitives.focus.ref.descriptio: Restore focus from a named reference slot.
behavior_primitives.branch.occupied.name: Branch On Occupied
behavior_primitives.branch.occupied.desc: Return true if the selected target is occupied.
behavior_primitives.branch.clear.name: Branch On Clear
behavior_primitives.branch.clear.descrip: Return true if the selected tile can be occupied.
behavior_primitives.branch.adjacent.name: Branch On Adjacent
behavior_primitives.branch.adjacent.desc: Return true if two actor targets are adjacent.
behavior_primitives.branch.relation.name: Branch On Relation
behavior_primitives.branch.relation.desc: Return true if two actor targets match the requested relation.
behavior_primitives.branch.tile_state.de: Return true if the target tile has the requested state.
behavior_primitives.branch.adjacent_bloc: Return true if the target actor is adjacent to blocking terrain.
behavior_primitives.counter.add.name: Add Counter
behavior_primitives.counter.add.descript: Add to a named counter on an actor, tile, or effect.
behavior_primitives.counter.consume.name: Consume Counter
behavior_primitives.counter.consume.desc: Consume from a named counter and return true if successful.
behavior_primitives.counter.at_least.des: Return true if a named counter is at least the step amount.
behavior_primitives.damage.apply.name: Apply Damage
behavior_primitives.damage.apply.descrip: Damage a target actor by a fixed amount or by a counter value.
behavior_primitives.damage.prevent_event: Reduce the current damage event to 0.
behavior_primitives.effect.attach.name: Attach Effect
behavior_primitives.effect.attach.descri: Attach an effect to an actor or tile.
behavior_primitives.effect.detach.name: Detach Effect
behavior_primitives.effect.detach.descri: Remove the selected effect from its target.
behavior_primitives.effect.has.name: Branch On Effect
behavior_primitives.effect.has.descripti: Return true if a target has the requested effect from the requested owner.
behavior_primitives.effect.damage_actors: Damage actors standing on tiles with an effect owned by self.
behavior_primitives.effect.clear_owned_t: Remove a tile effect owned by self.
behavior_primitives.move.relative.name: Move Relative
behavior_primitives.move.relative.descri: Move a target actor away from or toward a source actor.
behavior_primitives.move.step_toward.des: Move an actor one tile toward a target tile.
behavior_primitives.tile.set_state.name: Set Tile State
behavior_primitives.tile.set_state.descr: Set a target tile to the requested state.
behavior_primitives.tile.set_first_adjac: Set the first clear adjacent tile to the requested state.
behavior_primitives.heal.apply.name: Apply Healing
behavior_primitives.heal.apply.descripti: Heal a target actor by the step amount.
effects.marked.name: Marked
effects.poison.name: Poison
effects.bleed.name: Bleed
effects.lightning_shield.name: Lightning Shield
effects.ward.name: Ward
enemies.glass_hound.name: Glass Hound
enemies.glass_hound.purpose: Chases the player and rewards push/terrain play.
enemies.ash_scribe.name: Ash Scribe
enemies.ash_scribe.purpose: Marks tiles, then punishes standing on marked ground.
enemies.root_saint.name: Root Saint
enemies.root_saint.purpose: Raises terrain and heals near blocking tiles.
enemies.generic.name: Enemy
rules.none.name: No Local Rule
rules.none.description: No special local rule is active.
rules.brittle_stone.name: Brittle Stone
rules.brittle_stone.description: Pushing an actor into raised stone breaks the stone and deals 1 damage.
relics.patient_bell.name: Patient Bell
relics.patient_bell.description: Example relic scaffold. It listens after a spell resolves and routes through a behavior hook.
workings.mark_or_damage.name: Mark or Damage
workings.emergency_wall.name: Emergency Wall
ui.codex.title: Clause Codex
ui.codex.help: Clauses are spell nodes. Add them to the board, then connect output ports into another node's IN port.
ui.codex.flow.condition: Flow: TRUE continues when the condition passes; FALSE continues when it fails.
ui.codex.flow.next: Flow: NEXT continues to the connected clause.
ui.play.hint: Click a tile to target. E toggles the node editor.
ui.graph.input_tooltip: Connect the pending output to this node.
ui.graph.output_tooltip: Click this output, then click another node's IN.
